titleStmt.title: SII 34.138: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 138. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District.

summary.p: At the entrance into the kitchen in the Piplikēśvara temple, right side.
Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman [mistake for Parakēsarivarman] Vikramachōḻa, 7th year = A.D. 1125.

Uttama-piriyan, a madhyastha of Śrīkaṇṭa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam purchased land free of taxes from the sabhā of the village and donated it for offerings and for feeding five strangers daily in the temple of Tiruveṟumbiyūr-Āṇḍār. The land measuring 8 mā (of standard category) and equivalent to 2 vēli of virivu category was priced at 13.5 kāsu and the tax capital for the same was also 13.5 kāsu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOvirājakEsari panmarāna tribhuvanaccakaravattikaḷ śrī vikkiramacOḻatEvaṟku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu pāṇṭi kulācanivaḷanāṭṭu
mīkōḻai brahmatēyam cīkaṇṭa caturvēdati maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruveṟumpiyūr Āṇṭār kōyilil tirumāḷikaiyil kalveṭṭinapa
ṭi śrīkaṇṭacaturvētimaṅkalattu madhyastan Āyiraṅkāl ntuṟaiyanāna Uttamapiriyan tiruveṟumpiyūrāṇṭārkku Uccican=ti ciṟappu
m tirupōnakam Amutu ceytaruḷukaikku tiruvamutaruci nā vēṇṭum nellu kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum paruppu Amutu nāṉāḻikku vēṇṭum
nellu kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum kaṟi Amutum ney Amutum miḷakamutu caṟkarai Amutum Uppu Amutum Aṭaikkāy Amutum Ilai Amutum viṟaku
kkum vēṇṭum nellu nāṉāḻiyum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellu mukkuṟuṇiyum Apūrvi Āṇṭārkaḷ Aiyvarkku caṭṭi Oṉṟukku Aricinā
ṉāḻi Uriyāka vēṇṭum Aruci Eḻunāḻi Urikkum vēṇṭum nelluppatakku Irunāḻi mūvuḻakkum kaṟi Amutukkum Uppamutukkum
miḷaku Amutukkum Aṭaikkā Amutukkum Ilai Amutukkum vēṇṭum nellu nāṉāḻi Uḻakkum caṭṭi Iṭum kucavanukku ne
llu nāḻiyum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellu mukkuṟuṇiyum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellu tūṇi patakkāka Āṇṭuvaraikku vēṇṭu
m nellu nūṟṟeṇpatiṉ kalam Innellu nūṟṟeṇpatin kalamum cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka Iṟaiyiliyāka koṇṭu viṭṭa nilamāvatu
cīkaṇṭa catuvētimaṅkalattu mēpiṭākai rājadhirājavatikku mēṟku porovari vākkālukku vaṭakku 2- kkaṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattukku
mēṟkaṭaiya maṉaittiṭaluṭpaṭa nilamukkāṇiyum Iraṇṭāñcatirattu manaittiṭaluṭpaṭa nilamākāṇiyum Itanukkumēkku ciṟiya
muṭṭattil taṭi mūṉṟināl nilam Iraṇṭumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum mūṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutal catirattu mēlkkaṭaiya nilam
mukkāṇiyum Iṅkē Iraṇṭāñ catirattu nilam mākāṇi mun=tirikaiyum Iṅkēmūṉṟāñ catirattu nilam Orumāvum Iṅkē nālā
ñcatirattu kiḻakkaṭaiya taṭi Iraṇṭināl nilamukkāṇiyum Āka nilam Eṭṭumāvināl virivu nilam Iruvēli Iṉnilam Iru
vēliyum Iṟaiyiliyāka sabhaiyār pakkal koṇṭu nāṉ Iṭṭa kācu 10 3(1/2)yum Iṉ nilam Iṟai viḻutta Iṭṭa kācu 10 3(1/2)yum
Āka kācu 2 10 7 Ikkācu Irupattu Ēḻukkum Iṉ nilam Iruvēlikku Ūroppil varum veṭṭimuṭṭaiyāḷuṭpaṭa Eppēṟ
paṭṭa kuṭimai ceyyakkaṭavatallātākavum Ippaṭi can=tirātittavaṟ celvatāka koṇṭuviṭṭēṉ śrīkaṇṭa caturvētimaṅ
kalattu mattiyattaṉ Āyiravaṉ tiruvālatuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ Āna Uttamap piriyanēṉ śrīmāheśvara rakṣai śrīkaraṇattār rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
